title: Add test coverage for orchestrator/pipeline.py phase transitions
description: orchestrator/pipeline.py defines the Phase enum, PHASE_ORDER, SKIPPABLE_PHASES, and CRITICAL_PHASES. No dedicated test file exists. Phase ordering bugs would cause the pipeline to run phases out of order or skip critical phases silently.
requirements: Test Phase enum has all 12 phases
Test PHASE_ORDER is in correct sequence
Test CRITICAL_PHASES contains RESEARCH and SYNTHESIS
Test SKIPPABLE_PHASES does not contain critical phases
done_criteria: tests/test_pipeline.py exists with at least 5 test functions
context: Pipeline state machine is the backbone. Currently only tested indirectly via test_analyzer.py.
